name: ncu
description: Upgrade your npm package.json dependencies to the latest versions, ignoring specified versions

options.name: --cache
options.description: Cache versions to a local cache file. Default --cacheFile is ~/.ncu-cache.json and default --cacheExpiration is 10 minutes

options.name: --cacheClear
options.description: Clear the default cache, or the cache file specified by --cacheFile

options.name: --cacheExpiration
options.description: Cache expiration in minutes. Only works with --cache. (default: 10)

options.name: --cacheFile
options.description: Filepath for the cache file. Only works with --cache. (default: "~/.ncu-cache.json")

options.name: --color
options.description: Force color in terminal

options.name: --concurrency
options.description: Max number of concurrent HTTP requests to registry. (default: 8)

options.name: --configFileName
options.description: Config file name. (default: .ncurc.{json,yml,js,cjs})

options.name: --configFilePath
options.description: Directory of .ncurc config file. (default: directory of packageFile)

options.name: --cwd
options.description: Working directory in which npm will be executed

options.name: --deep
options.description: Run recursively in current working directory. Alias of (--packageFile '**/package.json')

options.name: --dep
options.description: Check one or more sections of dependencies only: dev, optional, peer, prod, or packageManager (comma-delimited). (default: ["prod","dev","optional"])

options.name: --deprecated
options.description: Include deprecated packages

name: --doctor
-d
options.description: Iteratively installs upgrades and runs tests to identify breaking upgrades. Requires -u to execute. Run "ncu --help --doctor" for details

options.name: --doctorInstall
options.description: Specifies the install script to use in doctor mode. (default: npm install/yarn)

options.name: --doctorTest
options.description: Specifies the test script to use in doctor mode. (default: npm test)

options.name: --enginesNode
options.description: Include only packages that satisfy engines.node as specified in the package file

name: --errorLevel
-e
options.description: Set the error level. 1: exits with error code 0 if no errors occur. 2: exits with error code 0 if no packages need updating (useful for continuous integration). (default: 1)

name: --filter
-f
options.description: Include only package names matching the given string, wildcard, glob, comma-or-space-delimited list, /regex/, or predicate function

options.name: --filterResults
options.description: Filters out upgrades based on a user provided function. Run "ncu --help --filterResults" for details

options.name: --filterVersion
options.description: Filter on package version using comma-or-space-delimited list, /regex/, or predicate function

options.name: --format
options.description: Modify the output formatting or show additional information. Specify one or more comma-delimited values: group, ownerChanged, repo, time, lines. Run "ncu --help --format" for details. (default: [])

name: --global
-g
options.description: Check global packages instead of in the current project

options.name: --groupFunction
options.description: Customize how packages are divided into groups when using --format group. Run "ncu --help --groupFunction" for details

name: --help
-h
options.description: Show help

name: --interactive
-i
options.description: Enable interactive prompts for each dependency; implies -u unless one of the json options are set

name: --jsonAll
-j
options.description: Output new package file instead of human-readable message

options.name: --jsonDeps
options.description: Like jsonAll but only lists dependencies, devDependencies, optionalDependencies, etc of the new package data

options.name: --jsonUpgraded
options.description: Output upgraded dependencies in json

name: --loglevel
-l
options.description: Amount to log: silent, error, minimal, warn, info, verbose, silly. (default: "warn")

options.name: --mergeConfig
options.description: Merges nested configs with the root config file for --deep or --packageFile options. (default: false)

name: --minimal
-m
options.description: Do not upgrade newer versions that are already satisfied by the version range according to semver

options.name: --packageData
options.description: Package file data (you can also use stdin)

options.name: --packageFile
options.description: Package file(s) location. (default: ./package.json)

name: --packageManager
-p
options.description: Npm, yarn, pnpm, deno, staticRegistry (default: npm). Run "ncu --help --packageManager" for details

options.name: --peer
options.description: Check peer dependencies of installed packages and filter updates to compatible versions. Run "ncu --help --peer" for details

options.name: --pre
options.description: Include prerelease versions, e.g. -alpha.0, -beta.5, -rc.2. Automatically set to 1 when --target is newest or greatest, or when the current version is a prerelease. (default: 0)

options.name: --prefix
options.description: Current working directory of npm

name: --registry
-r
options.description: Third-party npm registry. Run "ncu --help --registry" for details

name: --reject
-x
options.description: Exclude packages matching the given string, wildcard, glob, comma-or-space-delimited list, /regex/, or predicate function

options.name: --rejectVersion
options.description: Exclude package.json versions using comma-or-space-delimited list, /regex/, or predicate function

options.name: --removeRange
options.description: Remove version ranges from the final package version

options.name: --retry
options.description: Number of times to retry failed requests for package info. (default: 3)

options.name: --root
options.description: Runs updates on the root project in addition to specified workspaces. Only allowed with --workspace or --workspaces. (default: false)

name: --silent
-s
options.description: Don't output anything. Alias for --loglevel silent

options.name: --stdin
options.description: Read package.json from stdin

name: --target
-t
options.description: Determines the version to upgrade to: latest, newest, greatest, minor, patch, @[tag], or [function]. (default: latest) Run "ncu --help --target" for details

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Global timeout in milliseconds. (default: no global timeout and 30 seconds per npm-registry-fetch)

name: --upgrade
-u
options.description: Overwrite package file with upgraded versions instead of just outputting to console

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Log additional information for debugging. Alias for --loglevel verbose

name: --version
-v
options.description: Output the version number of npm-check-updates

name: --workspace
-w
options.description: Run on one or more specified workspaces. Add --root to also upgrade the root project. (default: [])

name: --workspaces
-ws
options.description: Run on all workspaces. Add --root to also upgrade the root project
